instructions: Always read AGENTS.md before making any change to this project.
This project operates under Australian law (Radiocommunications Act 1992 Cth).
Never produce transmit code, TX config, or TX-enabling instructions.
Never use FCC or ETSI rules — AU/ACMA jurisdiction only.
The hardware is HackRF One — receive-only. No TX ever.
Explain all RF concepts from first principles — user is a complete beginner.
Use OpenCode format only: AGENTS.md and opencode.json. Never Claude Code or Cursor format.
